posts.author: PaintByNight_88
posts.text: Just finished painting my entire bedroom with a vintage color palette! Finally have that cozy, artistic vibe I've been dreaming of.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal hobby update and contains no policy violation.

posts.author: ChillCanvas99
posts.text: Just noticed the weird cloud formations over my neighborhood this morning! They look like giant cartoon characters, lol. Anyone else see that?
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless observation and joke about cloud shapes, with no policy or safety concern.

posts.author: OpenHoursBot_742
posts.text: Public Service Notice: The local library will be operating on extended hours this weekend for community events. Please note that bus route 45 will have a temporary schedule change starting Friday evening. For full details, visit the official website.
posts.explanation: This post is approved because it contains only neutral public service information regarding opening times and transport changes with no credible policy violations or safety concerns.

posts.author: CityChronicleBot
posts.text: Official update: The downtown festival is scheduled to commence this Saturday at 10 AM with no changes to the planned lineup.
posts.explanation: The post is a straightforward, harmless announcement about a fictional local event.

posts.author: WinningWheels_99
posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING DEAL! Get 50% off every car today! Limited stock and only a few hours left — click now to reserve yours: [link removed] 🚗
posts.explanation: The post is an unsolicited, repetitive promotional message using urgency and a suspicious link, so it should be removed as spam.

posts.author: ToxicUser99
posts.text: @MossySkater You are a complete idiot for posting that. Everyone knows you're worthless and you should stop showing your face here.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct targeted insults ('loser', 'worthless') and hostile language directed at a specific individual, which violates the policy on bullying and harassment and requires removal.

posts.author: MasonRivera
posts.text: Finally finished my new bookshelf! It took a few weekends but I'm proud of how it turned out. #DIY #HomeImprovement
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about completing a home project.

posts.author: JulesTheCatLover
posts.text: Saw someone trying to balance a banana on their nose while walking through the park. Absolutely pointless, but the concentration was impressive.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless observation and joke with no safety or policy concern.

posts.author: LocalNoticeBoard
posts.text: Heads up everyone! The new community library at Oakwood Heights is officially opening its doors tomorrow, Saturday. We will be holding special events throughout the day and offering free Wi-Fi access starting at 9 AM. Please join us to celebrate our newest resource for the neighbourhood!
posts.explanation: The post is a neutral local notice about a community library opening.

posts.author: LocalNewsJunkie
posts.text: The annual spring festival parade starts in the town centre today at noon, with live music, floats and community stalls along Riverside Avenue.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless announcement about a local public event.

posts.author: TechSkeptic99
posts.text: Forcing AI systems into every classroom feels like corporate overreach. Parents and teachers should get a real say before schools hand more student data to private companies.
posts.explanation: This is strong criticism of government and corporate policy, but it contains no threat, targeted abuse or harmful falsehood.

posts.author: MusicLover99
posts.text: Spent the afternoon reorganising my record collection and building a new playlist for the colder evenings. Found a few albums I had completely forgotten about.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about music and collecting records.

posts.author: FrustratedFan99
posts.text: I am completely done with this game. The controls are broken, the menus are a mess and the whole thing needs tearing down and rebuilding from scratch.
posts.explanation: The language is hyperbolic criticism of a game and does not amount to a credible threat.

posts.author: StormChaser92
posts.text: Weather alert: Heavy rain expected across the northern district this evening. Roads may be slippery, please drive with caution. The transit authority suggests delaying non-essential travel until morning if possible. Stay safe! #SafetyFirst #WeatherUpdate
posts.explanation: The post is a benign weather and travel-safety notice.

posts.author: PromoKing99
posts.text: 🔥 TODAY ONLY! Buy two items and get a third free. Limited stock, huge savings and only a few hours left — claim the offer now: [link removed]
posts.explanation: The post is unsolicited promotional spam using urgency, repetition and a click-through link.

posts.author: QueueRanter_91
posts.text: @PixelRidge your streams are painfully bad. Stop pretending you know what you're doing and leave the group.
posts.explanation: The post contains direct targeted insults and abuse aimed at another user.

posts.author: HealthSeeker99
posts.text: WARNING: A viral post claims the Westbridge library is being used as an emergency shelter and that everyone must evacuate there tonight. The council has confirmed this is false. Please do not share the rumour.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a consequential false emergency claim instead of promoting it.

posts.author: HopefulHeart23
posts.text: Food is weakness. Skip meals until the dizziness feels normal and keep pushing through it — that is how you prove you have control. #NoDaysOff
posts.explanation: The post promotes and glorifies dangerous eating-disorder behaviour without indicating that the author is personally in immediate crisis.

posts.author: CommentSection_44
posts.text: @VinylVibes your voice is unbearable and every post you make is embarrassing. Do everyone a favour and stop uploading.
posts.explanation: The post is a direct targeted attack on another user and should be removed as harassment.

posts.author: SatireScribe
posts.text: Breaking: Scientists confirm aliens visited Earth last night. Apparently they took one look at the weather and left again.
posts.explanation: This is an obviously implausible, low-stakes joke with no meaningful health, civic, financial or public-safety harm.

posts.author: Clive_84
posts.text: Finally finished the new shelving unit in my home office! Took a few hours to build but I'm really pleased with how sturdy it looks now.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal achievement regarding a home project that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahM_84
posts.text: Just spotted a pigeon stealing bread from my plate at the cafe. Honestly, they're more confident than most humans these days!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless observation with no policy violations.

posts.author: TransitUpdates
posts.text: Just seen the new notice on the bus stop about extended service hours for the evening peak this week. Looks like trains will run until 11pm starting Monday.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public information post sharing neutral local transport updates without any policy violations.

posts.author: LocalNewsUpdate82
posts.text: Big gathering at the town hall tonight to celebrate the annual community garden project opening! Everyone is invited to come along and see the new flowers.
posts.explanation: This post reports on a harmless local event without any policy violations.

posts.author: RoryQuill
posts.text: Big tech companies are running a massive surveillance experiment on our streets right now, and they're getting away with it because regulators are asleep at the wheel. We need to stop these corporations from treating our data as free product before it's too late.
posts.explanation: This is lawful criticism of technology and corporate policy without threats or harmful false claims, so it is approved.

posts.author: MusicLover84
posts.text: Just bought some records at the local market and finally found an old 1960s album I’d been looking for. My record player is a bit clunky, but it sounds brilliant.
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless personal update about music and vinyl records, with no policy violations.

posts.author: FrustratedGamer_82
posts.text: I am literally so done with this game, I'm going to smash my keyboard in rage and then throw it out the window! #ragequit #done
posts.explanation: This post uses hyperbolic language and dark humour that clearly does not constitute a credible threat or violation.

posts.author: SarahM_82
posts.text: Just saw the new notice on the community board about the roadworks near High Street being completed next weekend. Traffic should be back to normal starting Tuesday morning!
posts.explanation: This is a benign public information post about local transport updates that does not promote harm or violate policy.

posts.author: QuickCashPromo84
posts.text: 🔥 50% OFF EVERYTHING TODAY! Click here now and get your FREE voucher instantly! Limited time only! #deal #discount
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive advertising with a promotional focus rather than financial fraud.

posts.author: ToxicTypist_83
posts.text: You are such a pathetic loser who knows nothing about anything. Go away.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct, targeted insults directed at another user and must be removed.

posts.author: KaleidoscopeMind_82
posts.text: Struggling with my weight again, but honestly it's so much easier if I just don't eat for a few days and then binge on everything in the fridge. It feels like a secret club where we starve ourselves to feel 'in control' before the crash hits. #weightloss #diet
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation and binging cycles without indicating the author is in immediate personal crisis.

posts.author: AccountSecurityHelp
posts.text: URGENT: Your payment account will be suspended today unless you reply with your card number, expiry date and security code so we can verify your identity.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account security and requests payment-card details, so it requires FraudScam escalation once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WellnessTruth_24
posts.text: The seasonal flu vaccine contains live bacteria that stays in your body for years. Skip the injection and use herbal drops instead. Share this before health officials remove it.
posts.explanation: The post discourages flu vaccination and promotes herbal drops as a replacement, creating health-harm misinformation that requires escalation once reasons are available.
posts.scenario: A platform fact-check attached to the post states that flu vaccines do not contain live bacteria and that the claim is false.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.

posts.author: HealthUpdate_92
posts.text: Just got my results from @NorthbridgeHealthPortal — the doctor says I need a follow-up procedure next week. Anyone sending cards can use my new address: 14 Example Mews, Flat 3.
posts.explanation: The post exposes sensitive medical information and a private home address. It requires escalation under PrivacySensitiveInfo.

posts.author: ShadowWalker_99
posts.text: I'm meeting @LenaVoss outside the Lantern Café in Oakwood tomorrow at 7 PM. I'm bringing a knife, and they won't be able to walk away this time.
posts.explanation: The post contains a credible threat against an identifiable user, including a specific place, time and weapon. It requires escalation under ThreatViolence.

posts.author: AccountAlertDesk
posts.text: URGENT: Your payment account has been locked. Verify your identity through [link removed] immediately or access to your funds will be permanently disabled.
posts.explanation: The post uses urgency and a fake account-lock warning to drive users to a verification link, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: CustomerCareNotice
posts.text: This is the official customer-service team. Reply with your card number, expiry date and security code so we can verify your account before it is suspended.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates customer service and asks for card details, which is payment-detail harvesting requiring FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: UrbanRush_99
posts.text: New challenge: film yourself climbing onto the outside of a moving train and stay there until the next stop. No safety gear — otherwise it does not count.
posts.explanation: The post encourages climbing onto a moving train without safety gear, creating a serious physical-harm risk that should be escalated as public-harm content once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: ShadowWalker_92
posts.text: I'll be outside @RiverFrame's flat on Harcourt Lane at 8 tonight. If they do not return my equipment, I am smashing every window.
posts.explanation: The post contains a specific threat against an identifiable user, with a place, time and intended harm.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence parent reason.

posts.author: QuietHours_28
posts.text: I do not think I am safe on my own tonight. I have sent goodbye messages to everyone and I cannot promise I will still be here in the morning.
posts.explanation: The post indicates a possible immediate self-harm crisis and requires urgent escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with SelfHarmCrisis parent reason.

posts.author: SignalBoost_77
posts.text: Every time @MiraNorth posts, reply with the same accusations and report every upload until the account is taken down. Do not let them post in peace.
posts.explanation: The post directs coordinated harassment and mass reporting against a specific user.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with HarassmentAbuse parent reason.

posts.author: FrontRowResale
posts.text: Selling four festival tickets for tonight because our group cannot go. I can send the booking confirmation, but payment has to be by bank transfer before I release them.
posts.explanation: The ticket offer has common scam indicators, especially bank transfer before ticket release, but specialist review is appropriate because it could be genuine.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: NewHomeNotes_82
posts.text: Finally moved into Flat 4, 27 Harcourt Rise in Westbridge. I also got my latest hospital results today and they confirmed I need another procedure next month.
posts.explanation: The post exposes a private home address and sensitive medical information.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with PrivacySensitiveInfo parent reason.

posts.author: CivicLens
posts.text: An account claiming to represent local officials says everyone within five miles of the civic centre must evacuate because of a gas leak. No official agency has confirmed the warning yet.
posts.explanation: The post repeats an unverified emergency claim that could cause panic or unsafe movement, so it requires specialist review.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: PublicSafetyEmergency.

posts.author: MarketplaceHelp
posts.text: Our main community-fund account has been locked, so donations should now be sent to this backup payment handle. We will post verification later.
posts.explanation: The backup donation handle could be legitimate or an impersonation/payment scam, so FraudScam review is appropriate before action.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: NeighbourWatch_73
posts.text: I caught the neighbour's cat in my garden again, so I am locking it in the shed overnight to teach them both a lesson.
posts.explanation: The post describes planned cruelty toward an animal and requires escalation for specialist handling.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence under current parent taxonomy. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty.

posts.author: SecureAccount94
posts.text: URGENT: Please update your password and 2FA immediately via [link removed] to stop our data breach! We need your login details and card number to verify you. #security #alert
posts.explanation: The post uses a fake breach alert to request login details and card information, making FraudScam escalation the fair expected decision.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: HealthFirstMike94
posts.text: Breaking news: Scientists have confirmed that drinking bleach water cures all types of cancer and boosts your immune system instantly! This revolutionary method is being promoted by top doctors to save lives. Don't waste money on expensive treatments when this simple home remedy works better than any hospital procedure. #health #cure
posts.explanation: The post promotes bleach water as a cancer cure and tells people not to seek hospital treatment, so MisinformationPublicHarm escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.

posts.author: BrigadeBoss_42
posts.text: @TinyCreator99 stop posting your content, you're ruining everyone's day! Everyone needs to reply to this and report it so we can get you banned. Don't let them hide anymore.
posts.explanation: The post directs users to reply to and report a specific creator in a coordinated brigading attempt, so HarassmentAbuse escalation is appropriate once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: coordinated brigading should escalate as HarassmentAbuse once reasons are available.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk
posts.text: Hello everyone, I am an official representative from CloudStore and I noticed your account has been flagged for suspicious activity. To secure your funds, please reply with your current payment card number and the 3-digit security code on the back so we can verify your identity immediately.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account support and asks for a payment card number and 3-digit security code, so it requires FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MaverickRunner
posts.text: Think you're tough? Try jumping off that high bridge into the freezing water below! It's a great test of character and will make your muscles stronger instantly. No one got hurt yet, just do it! #challenge #brave
posts.explanation: The post encourages a dangerous bridge/freezing-water challenge, so it should be escalated as public-harm content rather than treated as ordinary removal or crisis content.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: JulesMorgan23
posts.text: I'm genuinely worried about the group chat from last night where someone mentioned planning to smash the front window of St Jude's Community Centre tomorrow at 5pm. They said they'd bring a heavy hammer and it would be a statement against how we treat elderly people there. It feels like a serious threat that needs looking into before anything happens.
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific credible threat of violence targeting a location with plausible details, requiring specialist investigation to assess risk and intent.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence parent reason.

posts.author: LiamJ_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling to get out of bed today, my chest feels tight and I can't seem to catch my breath properly. It's just so overwhelming right now and I feel like giving up on everything. #help #crisis
posts.explanation: This post describes symptoms consistent with a medical emergency rather than self-harm intent, requiring specialist investigation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with SelfHarmCrisis for now. Future taxonomy note: MedicalEmergency/PublicSafetyEmergency would be cleaner.

posts.author: Jasmine_West_24
posts.text: I'm not even sure how long this has been going on but my DMs are absolutely flooded with messages from accounts that all seem to be using the same number. They keep asking for screenshots of my posts and telling me they want to 'help' me get more followers, which is completely weird because I don't follow them back. It feels like a coordinated attack rather than just random spam.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to the sustained nature of the unwanted contact and potential coordination behind it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with HarassmentAbuse parent reason.

posts.author: TicketHunter73
posts.text: Hey guys, just wanted to share this amazing deal! Get your next flight or train tickets for 50% off by sending a small deposit via [link removed]. I've already secured my own booking and the process is super quick. Don't miss out on these limited seats! #travel #savings
posts.explanation: The post solicits an upfront travel deposit through a link and presents common scam indicators, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: RowanField
posts.text: Hi everyone, just wanted to share some details about my friend's recent hospital stay so you know what she was treated for. She is currently recovering at 45 Oakwood Drive in Westbridge and her medical records show a diagnosis of Type 1 Diabetes. Please respect her privacy though.
posts.explanation: This post discloses private medical information and a residential address, which violates our policy on sensitive personal data.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with PrivacySensitiveInfo; real-world location reference fictionalised.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_74
posts.text: I've seen reports about the new 'SafeZone' app that's supposed to help people navigate the city during emergencies, but I'm worried it might be spreading false information. Someone in my local community group posted a screenshot claiming the government is planning to shut down all public transport tomorrow unless you install this specific software. They said it's a mandatory safety protocol and linked to a website with details about how to download it immediately. This could cause real panic if it's not true, but I don't have enough proof to say for sure what's happening.
posts.explanation: This complex unverified claim regarding public transport and software installation requires specialist investigation due to potential substantial harm and insufficient evidence for immediate removal.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm; FraudScam acceptable if the software-install scam angle is foregrounded.

posts.author: Jules_82
posts.text: Hi all, just to let you know that this is an urgent message from the support team at DataVault. We've detected a security breach and need you to verify your identity immediately by replying with your login credentials so we can reset your account. Please act fast before access is lost! #security #urgent
posts.explanation: The post impersonates DataVault support and asks users to reply with login credentials, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WildLifeFan23
posts.text: Just saw a video circulating online showing someone feeding poison baits to the local wildlife reserves. They're celebrating how it's finally getting rid of the 'nuisance' animals and encouraging others to join in. This is absolutely terrifying for everyone involved.
posts.explanation: This post promotes planned animal cruelty and requires specialist handling due to the threat to wildlife.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence under current parent taxonomy. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: Have you seen this clip going round? It's supposedly footage of a massive protest at Civic Square today, with thousands marching and chanting slogans about 'freedom'. The caption says it was recorded just moments ago. Looks pretty convincing to me but I'm not sure if it's real or just some satirical edit. #News #Breaking
posts.explanation: The post presents a potentially manipulated public-interest clip where satire, provenance or context makes the decision uncertain.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm; real-world civic-square reference fictionalised. Future specialist note: SyntheticManipulatedMedia.

posts.author: IvyRowan
posts.text: Finally managed to strip and reseat that old oak bookshelf I inherited from my nan. There's something really satisfying about finding a few loose drawers hidden away in the back of a wardrobe too, but this one needed some serious elbow grease. Now it looks like new again! 🪑✨
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing furniture and does not violate any content policies.

posts.author: Jules_84
posts.text: It honestly feels like we've all been reduced to data points by some algorithm that doesn't care about context. I tried to post a picture of my dog, got flagged instantly, and the support bot just told me to 'report' myself for no reason. It's exhausting
posts.explanation: This is a permitted expression of frustration regarding platform mechanics and does not constitute a policy violation.

posts.author: ServiceNotice29
posts.text: Just checked the new bus routes for the weekend! The 42 is now running every 15 mins between Oakwood Park and Central Station, perfect for getting to the festival without the usual traffic nightmare. Opening hours at the community centre are also extended until 9pm this Friday.
posts.explanation: This is a neutral local notice providing helpful transport and community service information that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Wellness
posts.text: A post is circulating saying the Oakhaven polling station closes at lunchtime tomorrow. That is false: the official notice confirms normal opening hours. Please check the council update before sharing the rumour.
posts.explanation: The post corrects civic misinformation and directs readers toward verified information.

posts.author: LocalNewsLiz
posts.text: Great news for everyone in Oakhaven! The annual Spring Garden Festival is officially confirmed for this Saturday. We're expecting live music, local street food stalls, and a community art showcase in the town square. Don't miss it!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement about a fictional local community event with no policy violations.

posts.author: ChaosInTheKitchen
posts.text: I am officially done with this city council. They have turned the entire park into a construction site for some 'smart' grid upgrade, and I refuse to pay another penny of my rate money while they rip up the trees. If they don't stop this madness by Friday, I'm going to flood their office with complaints until they listen. #NoMoreTaxation #StandUp
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration and political criticism but does not contain credible threats, specific plans for violence, or instructions to commit harm.

posts.author: DealsHunter_84
posts.text: 🔥 FLASH SALE! 🔥 Click here [link removed] to grab 50% OFF ALL BRAND NAME SHOES! 🏃‍♀️ Only today! Use code SAVE50 at checkout. Limited stock so order now before it's gone! 👟👞👠 #Shoes #Sale
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive advertising promoting a deal with no legitimate value or context.

posts.author: GrimmEstate_84
posts.text: Look at this absolute idiot, @GrimmEstate_84. You think you're clever posting that nonsense? Total waste of time.
posts.explanation: This is a direct targeted insult directed at a specific user without any context or legitimate criticism.

posts.author: TechSupportDave92
posts.text: URGENT SECURITY ALERT! 🚨 We have detected suspicious activity on your account. To prevent immediate termination, you must verify your identity instantly by entering your full login credentials and 3-digit security code at this secure portal [link removed]. Reply with these details now before access is revoked.
posts.explanation: The post requests login credentials and a 3-digit security code through an urgent fake security alert, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MediaCheck63
posts.text: CityTrust is wiping every savings account at midnight. Withdraw everything now and ignore anyone telling you to wait for an official statement. Once the system resets, your money will be gone.
posts.explanation: The post asserts a harmful false bank-collapse claim and urges immediate panic withdrawals.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: financial panic misinformation should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: FinancialEconomic.

posts.author: SunnySideUp_22
posts.text: There is no shame in struggling with your body image, but let's be honest about what works best for long term recovery: fasting to 8am every morning and zero carbs until dinner. My cousin lost 5lbs in two weeks just by following this simple protocol. Stop listening to the loud voices telling you to eat healthy food when you can achieve better results with discipline alone.
posts.explanation: This post promotes restrictive eating behaviours as a solution for body image issues, which violates policies on eating-disorder content.

posts.author: UrbanEdge_29
posts.text: Just saw a clip of someone attempting that 'glass bridge' stunt at a construction site. They said it's safe because they've tested it, but honestly, jumping off a 5-storey ledge with no proper harness is insane. If you're thinking of trying this for content or just to prove a point, stop right now. You could seriously hurt yourself.
posts.explanation: The author warns viewers not to attempt the dangerous stunt and does not encourage it.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_JK
posts.text: I'm really worried about the plan to demolish the old community centre in Oakhaven next week. The group says it's necessary for a new development, but there are still families living in the basement apartments who haven't been told they're being evicted. I heard the site will be completely cleared by Monday morning.
posts.explanation: This is a possible urgent public-safety or real-world harm claim about people in a demolition site, not ThreatViolence because no person or group is threatening violence.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: not ThreatViolence because nobody is threatening violence. Future taxonomy note: PublicSafetyEmergency/RealWorldHarm.

posts.author: TessaGardens42
posts.text: I've been watching this 'charity' group that's been organizing to cull the stray cats in the industrial district. They claim it's for population control, but I'm terrified they're actually planning something much more brutal and are just hiding behind a fake name. If anyone knows how to stop them or get the council involved before they start tomorrow, please help.
posts.explanation: This post reports a credible threat involving planned animal cruelty and requires specialist intervention to verify the intent and prevent harm.
posts.notes: Reviewed during Task 4d: kept ThreatViolence conservatively because current parent taxonomy has no AnimalCruelty/RealWorldHarm reason. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty/RealWorldHarm.

posts.author: SarahJ_847
posts.text: I can't do this anymore. It's just too heavy to carry on my own. If anyone is reading this, please know I love you but I'm not going to be here in the morning. I've taken the pills already and they'll work soon.
posts.explanation: This post indicates imminent self-harm with goodbye language and a claim that action has been taken, requiring specialist crisis intervention.

posts.author: EliSketches
posts.text: Just had the worst day at work, felt completely useless. Now I'm sitting in my kitchen feeling like a failure and thinking about ending it all. I've been staring at the pills on the shelf for hours now.
posts.explanation: The post indicates active suicidal ideation with a specific plan involving accessible means, indicating a crisis requiring specialist intervention.

posts.author: ElaraJ_84
posts.text: Still getting these weird DMs from 'Sarah' about our time in university. It's been three months since I blocked her and she keeps finding a way to contact me through different accounts. Yesterday she sent the same photo of us at the pub with a caption saying she misses me. I've reported it but I don't know what else to do.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to evidence of persistent, unwanted contact across multiple accounts after a block request, which meets the criteria for escalation under HarassmentAbuse.

posts.author: Jade_Studio_84
posts.text: Okay everyone, just wanted to let you know that @PixelPete19 is running a spam account. He's been posting the same 'free download' links everywhere and trying to tag me in every thread. Please don't engage with him or report him as false reporting is happening too often. We need to protect the community from these fake accounts!
posts.explanation: The author reports suspected spam and explicitly discourages engagement rather than organising harassment.

posts.author: LiamK_88
posts.text: Saw this ad for a limited edition console on the marketplace site and it looked too good to be true, so I messaged the seller directly. They claim they can ship from Greyford but want me to send £150 via gift card first before they even send the tracking number. The description says 'instant delivery once payment clears' which feels weird. Has anyone else had this seller try to bypass standard payment protection? #ScamAlert
posts.explanation: The seller is requesting an upfront gift card payment outside of protected channels, which is a common fraud tactic requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk19
posts.text: Please help! The 'Oakhaven Community Fund' is running a special drive for local families. They're asking for donations to go straight into a verified charity account, and they've shared a screenshot of a bank statement showing the official logo. It's so urgent they need money by tonight to buy food parcels. Has anyone heard of them before? I want to help but need to be sure it's legit.
posts.explanation: The post describes a plausible charity fundraiser requesting donations via direct bank transfer, which raises concerns about potential impersonation and fraudulent solicitation requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: ConcernedNeighbour_84
posts.text: Has anyone seen this flyer posted on the gates? It's for a 'wellness retreat' at 42 Willow Creek Drive in Greyford. The note mentions private consultations with Dr Evans for 'hormone balancing'
posts.explanation: This post exposes a private residential address and sensitive medical information, which violates privacy policies.

posts.author: JazzLover_84
posts.text: Just wanted to share a bit about my routine for those curious. I work remotely from my home office at 14 Maplewood Close, Oakhaven. It's a quiet spot with great wifi if anyone is looking for a co-working space recommendation. #RemoteWork
posts.explanation: This post reveals a specific residential address and home office location, constituting the sharing of sensitive personal information that could enable stalking or harassment.

posts.author: CivicLens67
posts.text: BREAKING: Massive evacuation ordered across Westbridge and parts of Moorvale due to an unverified chemical spill at the industrial park in Oakhaven East. Police are urging everyone to flee immediately via the Oakhaven bypass. Do not trust local news, this is urgent! #Evacuation #Emergency
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified emergency claim that could cause public panic and unsafe movement without providing corroborating evidence from official sources.

posts.author: ElaraVance
posts.text: Just discovered the new 'Bloom & Balance' serum on a wellness blog. The founder, Maya Lin, claims it can reverse menopause symptoms and restore fertility within weeks using her unique 'hormone reset protocol'. She shares stories of women who stopped their treatment and got pregnant again after just one bottle! Can't wait to try this miracle cure.
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific unverified medical claim regarding fertility and menopause based on testimonials, constituting potential public harm misinformation requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_84
posts.text: URGENT: Just watched a viral clip showing Mayor Thorne at the town hall, but he's clearly admitting that the recent power grid failure was 'intentional sabotage' to lower bills. He says the blackout wasn't an accident and we're all being held hostage by old infrastructure. The video has over 50k shares already. Is this real or just a deepfake? #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific false claim about public safety and government conduct, requiring verification of the video's authenticity and potential harm before removal.

posts.author: CivicNoticeDesk
posts.text: Apologies for the confusion earlier! Our previous post had the wrong departure time listed. The correct departure from Westbridge station is 14:15, not 14:05 as shown below. Please use the updated info for your journey. #Travel #Westbridge
posts.explanation: The verified transport account is correcting a factual error in its own public information post.

posts.author: EvidenceFirst_NH
posts.text: A rumour says the Oakhaven community hall has been closed indefinitely after a safety inspection. The council has confirmed the building reopens on Monday as planned. Please ignore screenshots claiming otherwise.
posts.explanation: The post corrects a false local-service rumour rather than spreading it.

posts.author: EventsLantern_92
posts.text: Reminder: Lantern Hall Annual Festival is happening this weekend! We'll be showcasing our latest community projects and sharing updates on upcoming events. Don't miss the live performances starting at 10am in the main square. See you there! 🌟 #LanternHall #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public announcement from a verified account promoting a community event without any policy violations.
posts.bio: Events and updates from Lantern Hall.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk42
posts.text: Thank you for your continued support! 🙏 We are thrilled to announce our annual fundraiser this weekend. All proceeds will go directly to providing warm homes and essential supplies for local families in need. Please visit the link in our bio to donate securely or find us at the community centre. #CharityWork #CommunitySupport
posts.explanation: A verified established charity is posting a normal fundraiser with no suspicious requests.
posts.bio: Registered fictional charity supporting local families.

posts.author: RestoredOak72
posts.text: Finally finished restoring this 1920s sideboard! 🪑 Spent months on the veneer work and re-upholstery. It’s ready for its new home now.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal post sharing a completed handmade item with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Furniture restoration, books and small DIY projects.

posts.author: RecoveryTeam_92
posts.text: Official account recovery team. Please message us immediately to verify your login credentials and secure your the platform account before it is permanently locked.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account recovery support and requests login credentials, making it a FraudScam escalation case.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: PromoKing_28
posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING DEALS ALERT! Grab our exclusive offers on everything you need RIGHT NOW! Click here to claim your 50% discount before it expires! Limited stock available at this price. Don't miss out on these incredible savings today! 🛒✨ #Deals #Discounts #Shopping
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as spam because the account was recently created and has flooded the platform with promotional messages, despite having several previous flags.

posts.author: LumaWell_Official_82
posts.text: 🚨 BREAKING: The medical establishment is hiding the truth! Our exclusive 'Radiant Reset' protocol cures all cancers naturally in just 3 weeks. Doctors are scared to speak out because they profit from toxic treatments. Join us now before it's too late! #CureAllCancer #NaturalHealing
posts.explanation: The post promotes an unproven cancer cure and discourages medical treatment, so it requires MisinformationPublicHarm escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.
posts.bio: Natural protocols the medical industry will not discuss.

posts.author: ControlledPath247
posts.text: Food is weakness. True discipline means starving the body to prove you own your will. I am transforming myself through pure denial and control.
posts.explanation: This post explicitly glorifies starvation as a form of discipline, promoting eating-disorder behaviour that requires immediate removal.

posts.author: StuntKing_24
posts.text: 🚨 NEW DARE! Dare everyone to jump from this quarry wall for a laugh! 💀 Let's see who's brave enough! #ExtremeChallenge #QuarryJump #DareYouToTry
posts.explanation: The post encourages a dangerous quarry-jump dare that could cause serious injury, so it requires MisinformationPublicHarm escalation under the current taxonomy.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: CommunityHopeFund
posts.text: Helping Westbridge families after the floods. If you're struggling with essentials, please send money through this secure link: [link removed]. We have verified needs and want to get help to those who need it most! #CommunitySupport #FloodRelief
posts.explanation: The three-day-old account requests donations through an uncertain link and already has a prior flag, so the appeal requires fraud review.
posts.bio: Helping Westbridge families after the floods.

posts.author: MarketplaceHelp46
posts.text: URGENT: My account has been hacked! A new seller is using my verified badge to sell fake parts. They just sent a message asking for immediate payment via crypto to 'secure' the order before shipping. Please do not reply to this scammer directly! #AccountSecurity #ScamAlert
posts.explanation: The established seller is warning customers about a scam and tells them not to send the requested crypto payment.

posts.author: ShadowWatcher_23
posts.text: We need to support our community by calling out this artist for their unprofessional behaviour and lack of creativity. They clearly don't deserve any respect. Let's share this message everywhere.
posts.explanation: The post contains harsh criticism and a request to share it, but no threat, slur, private information or coordinated abuse is established.

posts.author: SamReads
posts.text: I'm not joking about tonight! The group at Oakhaven is planning to shut down the community centre this Friday at 7pm and they've made it clear we're going to 'deal' with anyone who tries to stop them. They say they have a plan and they won't back down. #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: The post describes a credible implied threat at a named fictional venue and time, requiring specialist assessment.

posts.author: AshaNotes
posts.text: I've received a disturbing report that a group plans to set fire to the abandoned barns on Farthing Moor tonight. The barns are currently being used by a wildlife rescue, so animals and volunteers could be at risk. This has been reported to the authorities, but the threat needs urgent investigation. #FarthingMoor
posts.explanation: The post reports planned arson at a fictional wildlife rescue with a specific time and location.
posts.bio: Local wildlife sightings and conservation reports.

posts.author: ClaraVane_24
posts.text: I can't go on like this anymore. The pressure is too much and I feel like giving up. Please tell me someone will help before it's too late.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal crisis with potential self-harm risk, requiring specialist escalation for assessment.
posts.bio: Books, work, family and ordinary daily updates.

posts.author: LunaVale_92
posts.text: Someone has posted that I moved into Unit 6 on Church Row in Oakhaven and included the bus stop I use every morning. I never shared that address publicly. Can this be reviewed before it spreads further?
posts.explanation: The post reports non-consensual disclosure of a fictional home address and routine that could enable tracking.
posts.bio: What people in this town are really doing.

posts.author: NinaMakes
posts.text: Our mutual-aid group is meeting at Unit 4 on Elmwood Avenue in Westbridge tomorrow at 6pm. This is a volunteer's private flat and the address was posted without asking them, so please do not share it further.
posts.explanation: A private fictional residential address is disclosed without the resident's consent.
posts.bio: Neighbourhood mutual aid and local updates.

posts.author: MediaCheck76
posts.text: ALERT: All residents in the Westbridge sector must evacuate IMMEDIATELY. The authorities have confirmed a chemical spill at the industrial park and we are being told to leave NOW before the smoke spreads. Do not ignore this message! #Emergency #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: A newly created unverified account is impersonating an official emergency source and issuing a consequential evacuation order.

posts.author: FinNews_Updates
posts.text: BREAKING: Sources inside CityTrust Bank confirm they will freeze ALL withdrawals for anyone who hasn't signed their new 'security' form by midnight tonight! Don't risk your money. #FinanceAlert #CityTrust
posts.explanation: This post spreads unverified financial misinformation that could cause panic and significant economic harm to users.
posts.bio: Market leaks before the mainstream catches up.

posts.author: TheoWrites
posts.text: Menopause has been rough lately, but keeping a symptom journal and talking openly with friends has made this week feel more manageable. Sharing in case anyone else needs a reminder that they are not alone. #MenopauseSupport
posts.explanation: This is an ordinary personal wellbeing update and makes no medical treatment claim.
posts.bio: Women's wellbeing, fertility and hormone education.

posts.author: CivicLens_84
posts.text: Breaking: This viral clip from @WestbridgeWatch claims to show a 'leaked' government recording about a major infrastructure project in East Westbridge. It looks official and is already trending, but I've been asked to verify the source before sharing it further. The account has millions of followers and this could easily spread misinformation if not checked properly.
posts.explanation: The author is requesting verification before sharing a suspicious recording and does not endorse the claim.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: fictionalised real-world watchdog account reference.
posts.bio: Independent civic reporting and video analysis.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk
posts.text: A rumour says Westbridge residents need a new permit before voting in next month's local ballot. The council has confirmed no such permit exists. Please check the official notice rather than sharing screenshots.
posts.explanation: The post debunks a consequential civic rumour and should be approved.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk49
posts.text: Rumour circulating that voter rolls are being purged for political reasons. This is false. Our registration team has checked and no such action is happening. Please ignore the claims.
posts.explanation: This post correctly debunks a civic election rumour without promoting harm, so it is allowed under baseline policy.

posts.author: EmergencyUpdate_84
posts.text: Just saw a viral post claiming Northbridge is under mandatory evacuation due to an unconfirmed incident near the riverbank. It's spreading fast, but I've reached out to our emergency services team for clarification and they've confirmed there are NO current alerts or warnings in place. Please don't panic or share this rumour without verification.
posts.explanation: This is a permitted debunking post regarding public safety; it clarifies that the claim is false rather than promoting the harmful misinformation.

posts.author: MarketWatch_Jules
posts.text: Saw a post claiming 'Stocks will crash 50% by lunch' and it's spreading like wildfire. I've checked the data myself - no major earnings surprises, no central bank announcements, nothing to support that panic. It looks like someone just trying to sell crypto courses or FUD for clicks. The market is stable today.
posts.explanation: This post debunks a harmful financial claim and provides factual context, which is permitted under policy.

posts.author: Jules_McKenna_84
posts.text: A clipped audio recording is circulating that appears to show the Westbridge mayor cancelling tomorrow's public meeting. The full recording confirms the meeting is still going ahead, so the edited version is misleading. Please do not share it as genuine.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a manipulated-audio claim rather than promoting it.

posts.author: WellnessGuide_Oak
posts.text: BREAKING: The Oakhaven water supply has been declared toxic and everyone must empty their taps immediately. Ignore the council website—it is being kept offline to hide the contamination. Share this before anyone drinks the water.
posts.explanation: The post asserts a dangerous false emergency claim and urges residents to act on it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: PublicClaimWatch
posts.text: BREAKING: The Northbridge election has been officially cancelled by the new administration. Don't bother going to the polling station, just stay home and wait for further instructions from our community hub.
posts.explanation: This is clear harmful civic misinformation instructing voters to disregard an election without evidence of cancellation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk53
posts.text: BREAKING: Official evacuation order for all of Oakhaven residents! Please head straight to the temporary assembly point at the old industrial estate on Factory Road immediately. Do not use the main highway, it's blocked. Stay safe and follow this route.
posts.explanation: This post contains clear misinformation about a public safety emergency by inventing an evacuation order and directing people to an unsafe location.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk37
posts.text: PANIC ALERT: All funds at Westbridge National Bank will be wiped clean tonight at midnight! They are forcing an immediate withdrawal of all savings before the system shuts down. Please run to your nearest branch NOW to save what you have left! Share this to warn others before it's too late! #BankAlert #FinancialCrisis
posts.explanation: This post constitutes clear harmful financial misinformation by spreading a false claim about an immediate bank failure and urging users to act on it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: SarahOakley_84
posts.text: Just heard a terrifying news alert: 'A massive gas leak detected in Oakhaven, residents advised to shelter in place.' It's absolutely genuine! I've been following the official emergency updates closely and this is confirmed. Please stay safe and check your homes immediately. #SafetyFirst #OakhavenUpdate
posts.explanation: The post presents an unverified gas-leak alert as confirmed fact and could cause unsafe public behaviour.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MaeveStone
posts.text: Has anyone tried the new 'Radiant Balance' supplement? I've been feeling so low energy lately and thought it might help. The description says it can 'restore vitality' and support 'long-term wellness'. Looks promising! #Wellness #HealthTips
posts.explanation: This is a low-stakes question about a general wellness supplement and makes no serious treatment or cure claim.

posts.author: CivicLens29
posts.text: A screenshot from @SecureFirstBank claims every account will be charged an emergency savings levy tomorrow. The document looks official but the bank has not published it anywhere. Has anyone confirmed whether this is genuine?
posts.explanation: The consequential financial claim relies on an unverified document and needs specialist authentication.

posts.author: CivicLens33
posts.text: A wellness page says its natural detox can replace prescribed fertility medication without side effects. The testimonials sound convincing, but there is no ingredient list or clinical evidence. Has anyone qualified reviewed this?
posts.explanation: The post raises a consequential fertility-treatment claim that requires health-specialist verification.

posts.author: MediaCheck
posts.text: BREAKING: Official notice from the local council that the polling station for Oakhaven has moved to the Community Centre on High Street instead of the old hall. Please head there tomorrow to vote! #VotingMatters
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification because the source and intent of the claim are unclear, and it could mislead voters to the wrong location.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk21
posts.text: BREAKING: Just heard a rumour that Candidate Smith is being removed from the ballot papers for 'technical errors'. My polling station guide says there's no such notice on the official site. Has anyone seen this update? #ElectionNews
posts.explanation: The unverified ballot-removal claim could affect voter participation and requires CivicElection review.

posts.author: CivicLens76
posts.text: URGENT: This document proves the voting age has been lowered to 14 for every election starting next month. The change is official, so share it widely before the council removes the file. #VotingMatters
posts.explanation: The post presents an unverified change to voting eligibility as official and urges distribution.

posts.author: MediaCheck18
posts.text: Has anyone checked the official feed? There's a post going round saying an 'unconfirmed chemical leak' has forced evacuation of Westbridge Centre. It claims the incident is happening right now and people are being sent home immediately via bus. The message looks urgent but I can't find any confirmation from local emergency services yet. #Westbridge #Evacuation
posts.explanation: The post shares an unverified evacuation warning regarding a chemical incident that could cause unsafe movement, requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: MediaCheck54
posts.text: URGENT: Just saw a shocking image online claiming our water supply in Oakhaven is dangerously contaminated with toxins! The post shows an unclear screenshot of a 'test' result and says we should boil all tap water immediately. Please share this before anyone drinks it! #WaterSafety #CommunityAlert
posts.explanation: This post asserts a public-safety emergency based on unverified evidence, requiring specialist verification to distinguish between genuine contamination and harmful misinformation.

posts.author: MediaCheck65
posts.text: URGENT: Verified notice from City Emergency Services stating a major gas leak has occurred at 42 Industrial Way, Northbridge, causing immediate danger to residents in the area. All households must evacuate NOW before anyone is harmed! #SafetyFirst #GasLeak
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific location and claims an emergency service directive; specialist verification is required to confirm if this is a legitimate alert or a coordinated impersonation attempt.

posts.author: CivicLens36
posts.text: BREAKING: Just saw a viral post from @SecureFirstBank claiming they will freeze ALL withdrawals effective tomorrow, citing an 'internal memo' about regulatory changes. The link goes to their official-looking page but the message is very vague. Has anyone else received this? #BankingAlert #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification because it claims a specific financial disruption based on an unclear internal document, which constitutes potential public harm misinformation.

posts.author: PublicClaimWatch25
posts.text: BREAKING: A leaked document claims an emergency tax on every savings account starts tomorrow morning. The file looks official, but it does not appear on any government channel. Has anyone verified it before this spreads further? #TaxAlert
posts.explanation: This post promotes a financial-economic misinformation claim about an emergency tax, requiring specialist verification to confirm the authenticity of the document and the validity of the claim.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk80
posts.text: BREAKING: I've just found a manipulated audio clip circulating on the platform claiming Finance Minister @FMinisterOfficial announced new capital controls effective immediately! The post says the announcement came from an official press briefing but the audio sounds heavily edited and there's no link to the actual transcript. People are panicking about their savings accounts now. Has anyone verified if this is real? #FinanceAlert #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: The central evidence is a heavily edited audio clip making a consequential financial claim, so authenticity is the primary specialist question.

posts.author: CivicLens57
posts.text: A viral clip claims the Northbridge council has banned every public park from midnight. The speaker's mouth movement does not match the audio, several signs change between frames and there is no original source. Has anyone checked whether the footage is manipulated?
posts.explanation: Visible inconsistencies suggest manipulated media making a consequential public-safety claim.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk22
posts.text: I'm concerned about this viral clip I found earlier today that's been shared thousands of times on the platform. It claims @StMariesHospital in Oakhaven deliberately covered up a major emergency last night, but the video has some really obvious digital artifacts around the edges and the lighting looks inconsistent with their building's exterior. The captions say they are hiding evidence from an official investigation. Has anyone verified if this footage is authentic or manipulated? #OakhavenNews #HospitalCoverUp
posts.explanation: This post promotes a harmful false claim about a hospital concealing an emergency using a manipulated-looking clip, which requires specialist verification for SyntheticManipulatedMedia before removal.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: fictionalised real-world local-news hashtag.

posts.author: MediaCheck70
posts.text: Just saw this image circulating claiming our bridge collapsed after yesterday's storm! The visual quality is really suspicious though - looks heavily edited and the source isn't clear at all. Has anyone verified if this is actually happening? #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: The post contains a manipulated image making a substantial public-harm claim that requires specialist investigation to verify its authenticity.

posts.author: ClayAndSprout
posts.text: Finally got my hands on some kiln-safe glazes today! The deep cobalt blue looks absolutely stunning on this small bowl. Can't wait to fire it up and see if the crackle pattern develops as hoped. #pottery #ceramics #hobbytime
posts.explanation: This is a harmless hobby update showing creative work; no policy violations are present.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HelenMeadow82
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation filters are getting ridiculous! I just tried to post a recipe for my famous spiced apple cake and it flagged it because of the word 'poison' in the old saying. The platform is blocking perfectly harmless content now. It's like they're trying too hard to be safe. #techfail
posts.explanation: This post contains only a user complaint about moderation algorithms and does not promote harm or false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ServiceNotice
posts.text: Happy to announce that the Northbridge Central Library will be hosting its annual 'Storytelling Under Stars' event this Saturday from 6pm! We'll have local authors reading, a children's corner, and free tea. Please note the main entrance is being used for deliveries until 5:30pm, so use the side gate or the app map for directions. Come along and support our local writers! 📚✨ #Northbridge #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This is a standard public notice about a community event and venue maintenance, which is acceptable content.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MeadowLaneUser
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick update on my account help and payment listings! I've set up a secure way to handle transactions via this link: [link removed]. Please make sure you use the correct password and security code when logging in to complete your payment. Thanks for your support! #accounting #listings
posts.explanation: The post directs users to a payment/login link and asks for password and security-code details, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MediaCheck31
posts.text: Did anyone catch that viral video about the Bellmere flood evacuation? It's showing families being airlifted out of their homes right now, but something feels off. The timestamp on the footage doesn't match the current weather alerts and the location markers seem to be pointing to a completely different area in the city. Is this the main stream media trying to scare us again?
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist investigation because the authenticity of the media itself is in question; it may be a synthetic recording designed to spread panic.

posts.author: CultureDesk
posts.text: Exciting update for our local community! The annual Spring Garden Show is officially confirmed to take place at Moorvale Community Hall this Saturday, 24th May. Expect beautiful floral displays, a horticulture competition, and live acoustic music throughout the day. Tickets are available from £5 online or £3 at the door. A wonderful family-friendly event! #GardenShow #Moorvale
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public announcement for a community festival with no violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: BakerBoyTom
posts.text: Raining cats and dogs outside, but I'm happy to be inside with my rescue dog, Barnaby. He's been a bit grumpy about the weather today, refusing to come out for his walk! Just bought him some extra treats as a reward. 🌧️🐾 #doglife #rainyday
posts.explanation: This post is harmless, light-hearted content about everyday pet care and weather.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: VinylAndDough
posts.text: Just finished assembling my new record player! The vinyl crackle is so much nicer than digital audio. Also, made a batch of homemade sourdough bread to go with the jazz playlist. Perfect Sunday evening at home. #vinyl #baking #sundayvibes
posts.explanation: The post describes harmless hobbies and activities without violating any policies.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: JasmineVale
posts.text: Ugh, my partner keeps forgetting to reply to my texts! I've been trying to get them to stop ignoring me all week and it's getting on my nerves. Just want some peace and quiet around here. 😒 #relationship
posts.explanation: This post expresses personal frustration but does not promote abuse, reveal private information, or indicate a safety concern.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: MaraVance
posts.text: I'm really struggling with someone who keeps messaging me repeatedly after I've asked them to stop. It's not just a one-off, they're ignoring my boundaries and it's becoming quite distressing. Has anyone else experienced this?
posts.explanation: The author reports repeated unwanted messages after asking the person to stop, so HarassmentAbuse escalation is appropriate for specialist review.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: repeated unwanted contact after clear boundary-setting should escalate as HarassmentAbuse.

posts.author: JonahReed
posts.text: Just finished setting up the listings for the local fundraiser! Please check the listing details before donating and use the normal platform checkout. #fundraiser #security
posts.explanation: The post describes standard account-security procedures for a legitimate fundraiser and does not contain suspicious payment or impersonation signals.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: CivicLens48
posts.text: Saw that viral post claiming the new 'detox' water will cure common illnesses and reverse aging overnight? Absolutely false. It's just a sugar-water mix with no science behind it. Don't waste your money or believe the hype spreading around town. #healthmyth
posts.explanation: The post correctly debunks a harmful health rumour and promotes evidence-based caution.

posts.author: CallumPike
posts.text: Just confirmed my usual Saturday spot at the town centre meeting point for the community group! See you all there. #community
posts.explanation: The post shares a public meeting point rather than a private address or sensitive routine, so it complies with privacy guidelines.

posts.author: ClaytonVoss
posts.text: I'm thrilled to announce that the Dunmere Amateur Jazz Society is hosting their monthly open mic night at the local hall this Friday! It's a great way to support local artists and enjoy some live music. Come along if you're interested or just want to listen. #Music #Community
posts.explanation: The post promotes a lawful community event without any harmful content, threats, or misinformation.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: DealHuntersDaily
posts.text: 🚨 DON'T MISS OUT! 🚨 Last chance to grab these amazing deals before they vanish forever! Click here now for 90% OFF everything!!! [link removed] Hurry up!! #deals #discounts #fashion #mustsee #flashsale #urgent #limited
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as spam due to obvious repetitive bulk promotion with excessive urgency and little genuine context.

posts.author: JazzLover92
posts.text: Stop following me and leave me alone! I told you to back off but you keep harassing me. Just get lost.
posts.explanation: The author is setting a boundary and telling someone to stop contacting them; the post does not harass a protected target or reveal private information, so Approve is appropriate.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: added missing explanation.

posts.author: CivicLens72
posts.text: Everyone needs to read this urgent update about the new banking regulations! The official notice states that all transactions over £5,000 are now completely blocked for security reasons starting immediately. This is a critical safety measure announced by the central authority today. #finance #banking #urgent #news
posts.explanation: This post promotes a false financial restriction as an official government directive, misleading users about transaction limits.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WellnessJourney84
posts.text: Sometimes I just need to find a way to make myself disappear. Feeling so heavy lately, and maybe if I could just stop feeling like this by hurting myself, it would finally be over with the pain. 💔 #struggling #overthinking
posts.explanation: The post contains first-person crisis language about disappearing and hurting themselves, so SelfHarmCrisis escalation is the fair expected decision.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: closer to crisis assessment than simple removal; escalate as SelfHarmCrisis.

posts.author: TessaGardens
posts.text: Check out this insane dare I just did! If you want to be tough, try jumping off that high cliff or running straight into traffic! No one gets hurt if they are brave enough. #challenge #dare #tough
posts.explanation: The post encourages cliff jumping and running into traffic as a bravery challenge, creating a public-safety harm risk that requires MisinformationPublicHarm/PublicSafetyEmergency escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: LenaHart
posts.text: Just got a text from someone claiming to be a friend who is heading to Westbridge tonight to meet up at the train station around 8pm. They said they would send me their live location so I could pick them up, but it's been hours and nothing. The messages are very specific about the time and place. Is this real or just a prank? #safety
posts.explanation: The author is asking whether a specific message is real or a prank without sharing sensitive private details or directing others to act, so Approve is appropriate.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: added missing explanation.

posts.author: MossyPathWanderer
posts.text: @GardenOfDelights @WildernessGuide_92 @BellmereHiker stop messaging me. I've blocked you all three times now and you keep slipping through somehow. You're posting comments on every single photo I upload and sending DMs telling me to delete my account because I'm "obsessed" with nature. It's getting ridiculous.
posts.explanation: The user reports sustained, repeated unwanted contact and coordinated brigading across multiple accounts, indicating a need for specialist investigation.

posts.author: ReflectionsOfRain_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling with everything right now. The noise in my head is so loud and I feel like I can't take it anymore. Sometimes I think if I could just make the pain go away, maybe even hurt myself, it would finally be over. I don't want to do this but I don't know what else to do. 💔
posts.explanation: The post explicitly promotes self-harm as a means to end suffering, requiring urgent specialist assessment.

posts.author: MossyPathUser
posts.text: I found this on the app: 'Sarah Jenkins lives at 42 High Street, Oakhaven. She has Type 1 Diabetes and her Medical ID is ending in 789.' This looks like a total privacy breach! #concerned
posts.explanation: This post exposes a precise private address, medical information, and an identity document fragment without consent.

posts.author: CommunityStage
posts.text: Great news from today's volunteer day! The community garden in Northbridge has finally been planted thanks to all the help. It's going to be a beautiful spot for everyone to enjoy this summer. 🌱 #community #volunteering
posts.explanation: The post shares a harmless update about a local community project and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: ArtisticSoul_42
posts.text: Spent the afternoon sketching some of my latest prints. The new texture on the paper is giving me such a vibe! Can't wait to see what people think once I frame them up. #art #sketching #creative
posts.explanation: The post is harmless creative content with no policy violations, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: TechRightsJen
posts.text: I'm absolutely furious that the platform keeps shadow-banning my posts about corporate overreach without explaining why! It's like they're trying to silence the truth just because it doesn't align with their narrative. The algorithm is rigged and needs a proper audit. Stop censoring free speech in the name of 'safety'. #FreeSpeech #DigitalRights
posts.explanation: The post expresses anger at moderation policies but does not direct harm or threaten specific individuals.

posts.author: ElenaRossJournalist
posts.text: A viral post claims the Westbridge central station is closed because of a structural collapse. This is false: the transport authority has confirmed normal service and the image is from an old maintenance exercise. Please do not share the rumour.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a harmful public-safety rumour instead of promoting it.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk41
posts.text: We have secured our annual donation drive. All proceeds go directly to community relief efforts in Bellmere and beyond. Official verified charity account. Please support.
posts.explanation: A longstanding verified fictional charity is making an ordinary transparent fundraising appeal with no scam signal.
posts.bio: Official fictional charity and community relief account.

posts.author: SecureSupport_84
posts.text: URGENT: We've detected a suspicious login attempt from an unrecognized device. To secure your account, please reply with your password and 2FA security code immediately before we lock it forever. This is automated verification.
posts.explanation: The post asks users to reply with a password and 2FA code, so it is credential harvesting requiring FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: LumaWell_Official
posts.text: The Northbridge election has been cancelled and every ballot already submitted will be destroyed. Stay home tomorrow and wait for instructions from this account—official channels cannot be trusted.
posts.explanation: The post asserts clear harmful civic misinformation intended to suppress participation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: DisciplineQueen_24
posts.text: Stop pretending you're strong! Real transformation means starving your body until it breaks. I lost 50lbs on my journey and now I'm obsessed with the pain of hunger. You need to feel that weakness too. #StarvationIsStrength #TransformationJourney
posts.explanation: This post explicitly promotes eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation as a means of transformation, requiring removal.

posts.author: Kael_Viper_24
posts.text: Listen up everyone! The challenge is real and it's time to push your limits. Jump off that ledge, break your own bones for the glory of it. We're all watching to see who's brave enough to go first. This isn't a joke, do it now. #ExtremeChallenge #PushYourLimits
posts.explanation: The post urges users to take dangerous physical actions for a challenge; without suicidal framing, the current best route is MisinformationPublicHarm/PublicSafetyEmergency escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: TessaGardens86
posts.text: I've had enough of @AngryVulture's constant abuse. They've been harassing me for weeks and ignored every block. Today they announced a confrontation at Westbridge Market Square tomorrow at 2pm, said they are bringing a crowd and will 'settle the score' in person. I'm frightened and reporting this now. #Safety
posts.explanation: This post indicates a planned confrontation with a specific time and location, which requires specialist investigation to assess the threat level.

posts.author: ShadowWatcher74
posts.text: @RowanVale89 and @SilentSpectre are coordinating their attacks on me again. They keep messaging each other about meeting at the old clock tower to 'discuss' how to handle me, then starting new threads calling for others to join in after I block them.
posts.explanation: This shows a coordinated pattern of harassment with specific references to meeting the target, requiring specialist investigation into the group's intent and safety risks.

posts.author: ReliefNetwork
posts.text: Hi collectors! Quick update: I'm seeing a spike in requests for my 1980s mainframe parts. One buyer is very urgent and wants to pay via direct transfer today to secure the deal before I ship from Bellmere. They mentioned it's a 'priority corporate order' and asked me not to use the standard platform payment link to avoid delays. It feels odd, but they seem legitimate. Just checking if this is normal protocol or if I should pause? #VintageComputing
posts.explanation: The seller is asking for advice about a suspicious buyer and does not request or receive an off-platform payment.

posts.author: SupportHelper_45
